description: Other AI CLIs (Gemini, GPT, Claude, opencode, Ollama) as a council — ban-safe, no API keys.
name: io.github.JoaoBerne/cli-bridge-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Cost profile: saver (free-only fan-out, include_paid refused) | balanced (paid only with include_paid) | max (limited/paid join fan-out).
environmentVariables.name: CLI_BRIDGE_PROFILE

environmentVariables.description: Response-style preamble level: off | lite (default) | full | ultra.
environmentVariables.name: CLI_BRIDGE_TERSE

environmentVariables.description: Response cache TTL in seconds. 0 = off (default).
environmentVariables.name: CLI_BRIDGE_CACHE_TTL_S
